_comment: Semantic zone name -> list of segment ids from segments.json. Built from a first visual pass of the auto-segmented UV; VERIFY/EXTEND against zones/segments_preview.png. Unlisted segments are currently unnamed.
_groups_comment: Named unions of zones for convenient multi-zone fills (seam-safe along boundaries). Usable anywhere a zone name is. DRAFT, refine with zone names.

_unverified._comment: Large segments not yet confidently named — need Jay to identify.
